overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, approaching a massive stadium with a glowing pink holographic display. The footage showcases high-quality game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections on wet pavement, passing by police cars, street vendors, and temporary tent encampments.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city street corner with elevated transit tracks

events.description: turning right to follow the sidewalk alongside elevated transit tracks
passing a parked police vehicle on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk in heavy rain, approaching a futuristic stadium with a massive pink holographic display

notable_agents.action: police car parked on the street with illuminated blue signage

entered.detail: elevated train tracks with yellow and blue striped train cars visible
massive circular stadium structure with large pink swirling holographic display
low-rise commercial building with illuminated windows and neon signage
tall street lamp casting bright light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy city intersection at night, with the camera walking along a wet sidewalk next to elevated transit tracks. A police car is parked on the right side of the street, and in the distance, a massive stadium with a glowing pink holographic display dominates the skyline. The neon-lit environment reflects off the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching stadium plaza with billboards

events.description: slight left curve along the sidewalk as the street bends
passing under a large rotating cylindrical holographic billboard

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, getting closer to the stadium while passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding a black umbrella walking toward the camera in the rain

entered.detail: large rotating cylindrical billboard with multiple advertisement screens
food cart with yellow umbrella and striped red-white barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella. The holographic stadium grows larger in the center of the frame, while a massive cylindrical billboard rotates on the right. A street vendor cart with a yellow umbrella becomes visible on the left as the elevated transit tracks fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area directly in front of holographic stadium

events.description: moving from sidewalk onto the street level approaching the stadium entrance
walking straight toward the stadium between construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the massive holographic stadium, passing red and white construction barriers and temporary structures

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers lining the street
makeshift shelters and tarps set up along the barrier wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza as the camera approaches the massive stadium with its swirling pink hologram. Red and white construction barriers line the left side of the street, with temporary tents and makeshift shelters visible behind them. The street vendor cart with the yellow umbrella is passed on the left as the stadium dominates the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: temporary encampment between construction barriers and building wall

events.description: entering narrow passage between construction barriers and corrugated metal building wall
slowing down to examine the temporary tents and shelters

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow passage between barriers and building, closely examining temporary tents and makeshift shelters

entered.detail: military-style camouflage tarp shelter flapping in the wind
green metallic dome-shaped temporary structure with corrugated roof
industrial building wall with vertical corrugated metal panels

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow confined space between the construction barriers and an industrial building wall. The focus shifts to temporary encampments with a camouflage tent and a green dome structure. The massive stadium is now behind and to the left, barely visible, as the camera explores the makeshift shelters in this sheltered corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city intersection toward a massive holographic stadium before veering into a secluded industrial corridor. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath elevated transit tracks, where the glow of a distant pink hologram and a parked police car reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera advances, the stadium grows larger in the frame and the transit tracks recede, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella and a rotating cylindrical billboard. The scene then opens into a wide plaza lined with red and white construction barriers and a street vendor with a yellow umbrella, bringing the swirling pink hologram of the stadium into full view. Finally, the camera turns away from the landmark to enter a narrow space between a building wall and the barriers, shifting focus toward a makeshift encampment of camouflage and green dome tents.
